tests.name: route is explicit
tests.expected: Evidence packet requires one selected route: LIVE, RECORDED REAL RUN, LOCAL FALLBACK, or ROADMAP.

tests.name: live evidence identifiers are required
tests.expected: LIVE route requires project_id, run_id, before artifact, after artifact, and verify artifact.

tests.name: truth badges have downgrade paths
tests.expected: Each demo segment lists the evidence field justifying its badge and a downgrade label if evidence is missing.

tests.name: timing pass requires measurements
tests.expected: three_minute_timing_pass remains false unless three measured timing rows are filled.

tests.name: roadmap capabilities stay downgraded
tests.expected: Browser Shield Pill, CLI install, generated CI, readiness checks 5-12, and legal/platform findings default to ROADMAP or static review indicator.
